title.en: Ye Tian pondered for a moment and chose another...

content.en:
"Sixteen safe extradimensional passages, the passage of Wumu Zhentu must not be able to enter, otherwise the Tricky Wood Red Dragon will definitely think that I leaked here. "

Ye Tian pondered for a moment and chose another safe passage.

Wow!

He walked through this extradimensional passage and soon arrived in another area of the Land of Inheritance.

Here he saw a piece of gravel.

Of course, this is not an ordinary gravel, but an extremely precious treasure, even if it is not as good as the true picture of Wumu, I am afraid it is not too much worse.

The transcendent realm of the sixth realm, taking out an inconsequential treasure at random, is also the supreme treasure that the third realm and the fourth realm want.

The same goes for this grit.

Ye Tian couldn't take away this grit, and after the soul will penetrated, he saw countless layers of dimensional worlds, and comprehending these dimensional worlds seemed to witness all the mysteries of the world.

At this time, he also knew what the first test here was.

Comprehend the dimensional grit, comprehend a top-notch super-dimensional supernatural power, and you can pass the test

It is not difficult to create super-dimensional superpowers, but it is not easy to comprehend a top-notch super-dimensional supernatural powers.

Ye Tian 14 was able to create a forbidden super-dimensional supernatural power, and it was only by using a variety of auxiliary means such as thirteen-fold blood-colored treasure lotus and multi-dimensional wisdom light that he was able to create it.

Of course, the difficulty of creating a top-notch superdimensional supernatural power will be lower, but for the other third realms, this difficulty is terrifying.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian comprehended that this dimensional grit came from the creation of a top-notch super-dimensional supernatural power, but it took time.

As time passed, Ye Tian felt more and more that this dimensional grit was too extraordinary, far from being comparable to ordinary treasures.

The longer he meditated, the more he felt that he didn't understand.

In the blink of an eye, more than thirty extradimensional epochs have passed.

With the help of multi-dimensional wisdom light, thirteen blood-colored treasure lotus, soul treasure bottle, and the dimensional grit of the outside world, he finally created a top-notch super-dimensional divine power and passed this test.

Then, the reward is to be given.

Ye Tian took a look at the list of treasures, which was similar to what he had seen before.

This time, he didn't hesitate too much, and quickly chose a treasure - the Wumu Ancient Stone.

The role of the Wumu Ancient Stone can only act on the body of the Wumu, and the body of the Wumu wants to break through from the first layer to the second layer, just relying on the essence of the Four Realms of Multi-dimensional Treasure Hu, it may not be able to break through, and the Wumu Ancient Stone is the most suitable item for the breakthrough of the body of the Wumu.

With it, once Ye Tian raised the Wumu body to the limit of the first layer of Dacheng, he could use it to complete the breakthrough one hundred percent.

Ye Tian wanted the Wumu Ancient Stone at the beginning, but he took a fancy to the more suitable Jiuwutu.

But now, Jiuwutu is of little use to him, so he naturally needs the Wumu Ancient Stone even more.

Wow!

The Wumu Ancient Stone fell into Ye Tian's hands and was put away by him.

Soon, the second test arose.

Comprehend the dimensional gravel, create your own three-dimensional multi-dimensional mastery

Multi-dimensional !!!

It was the first time Ye Tian had heard of this, but he quickly learned the knowledge of multi-dimensional mastery from the relevant information.

The multi-dimensional mastery is above the super-dimensional supernatural powers, and the three-realm multi-dimensional mastery is the most suitable multi-dimensional mastery for the third realm, and the minimum requirement for wanting to perform multi-dimensional mastery is to comprehend a hundred super-dimensional rules and have the realm of super-dimensional rules.

It can be said that the difficulty of creating a self-created Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Skill is more than ten times more difficult than the previous difficulty of creating a top-notch super-dimensional supernatural power.

But once he creates a three-realm multi-dimensional mastery, his strength will also transform.

In fact, the general super-dimensional supernatural power, with the continuous improvement of cultivation, is already very low in power, and it is impossible to exert his strength at all.

Of course, the Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Technique that he wanted to create himself was best to be able to combine the power of the Ka Ye Wisdom Body and the Wu Mu Body to burst out, so that he could truly exert extremely terrifying attack power.

So, in the following days, Ye Tian took advantage of the opportunity to comprehend the grit dimension and constantly tried to create a multi-dimensional mastery of the Three Realms.

At the beginning, Ye Tian was still very confused about how to create a multi-dimensional mastery, but gradually he had some understanding.

"Open up a dimensional void with the realm of extradimensional rules, and then integrate the power of the two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies into it, turning it into an attack and bursting out. "

That is to say, he has a variety of means to improve his understanding and analysis, so that he can continue to create experiments.

Unconsciously.

Five hundred extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Wumu body had cultivated to the first level of Dacheng Extreme Realm, but since his copy body had not yet gone out, and the Wumu Ancient Stone could not be sent out, he did not choose to break through for the time being.

Wait for the breakthrough and then make the breakthrough.

After another period of time, he finally created a three-realm multi-dimensional mastery.

Dimensional gravel.

Ye Tian's soul will can simulate the Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Technique here, and the power of his two innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies converges and fuses together, and under the effect of the extra-dimensional rule realm, it gradually turns into one-dimensional grit.

Burst!

This dimensional gravel runs through at a speed that surpasses everything, directly annihilating layers of dimensions, and the terrifying power surpasses the top super-dimensional supernatural powers, even if it is the top fourth realm super-dimensional realm facing this move, if there is no hole card life-saving means, it will be killed by a move.

"What a terrifying move, this is only 083 is just a three-realm multi-dimensional mastery, what if you create a four-realm multi-dimensional master?"

Ye Tian began to look forward to it, if he created the Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Sect, his strength would skyrocket again.

"This multi-dimensional mastery is named Sand and Gravel Robbery!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, although the Sand and Gravel Tribulation is terrifying, it is only slightly more powerful than the current Black Light Thorn.

He had now cultivated the forbidden super-dimensional divine power of the Black Light Thorn to the point where he could release two Black Light Thorn attacks, and his power was naturally very good.

"Maybe I can perfect the Black Light Thorn into a multi-dimensional mastery of the Four Realms, in that case, the power will be terrifying!"

Ye Tian had this idea, but he definitely couldn't do it in a short time.

......

As Ye Tian created the Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Technique, he naturally passed the second test, and the reward emerged.

There are many rewards, but it seems that Ye Tian finally chose the most suitable reward for him at the moment - Dimensional Gravel.

Wow!

A very small dimensional gravel appeared in Ye Tian's hand, which was ten times smaller than the dimensional gravel used for the test, but Ye Tian was already extremely satisfied.

With this dimensional grit, he has the hope of creating his own Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Learning!

"Just choose Dimensional Gravel!"

Wow!

This dimensional grit was put away by Ye Tian, and then he left quickly.
